Your invoice for PO-0067 will reflect the updated pricing. Happy to discuss if you want to renegotiate for next quarter.

Cheers,
Diane

subject: Payment Reminder — Invoice INV-0128
body:
Dear Accounts Payable,

This is a friendly reminder that invoice INV-0128 for $6,400.00 (PO: PO-0128) is approaching its due date. Please ensure timely processing.

Thank you,
GreenLeaf Office Supplies Accounts Receivable

subject: Delivery Confirmation Request — PO-0037
body:
Hi Tom,

Our records show that PO-0037 was delivered on March 07 but we haven't received payment acknowledgment yet. Could you confirm receipt on your end?

Thanks,
Wendy Brooks
CoreFabric Textiles

subject: Delivery Confirmed — PO-0091
body:
Hi Tom,

Just confirming that our carrier has marked PO-0091 as delivered to your facility. Please let us know if there are any issues with the shipment.

Thanks,
John Martinez

subject: Re: PO-0017 - Stock Availability Update
body:
Hi David,

Following up on your order PO-0017. We're currently running low on PCB Standard FR4 — only have about 240 units in stock right now.

I can fill the remaining 60 units with our PCB Enhanced Multi-Layer at $52.00/unit instead of $34.00. Same specs, just higher grade.

Let me know if that works for you.

Best,
Steven Kim
TechParts Direct
